name: air_passengers_with_aviation_context
description: Monthly international airline passengers 1949–1960 (Box & Jenkins) enriched with synthetic aviation context variables. Two source files must be joined on 'month' before running the pipeline: air_passengers_base.csv (target series) and aviation_context.csv (exogenous features). The output dataset has 144 rows and 4 columns. This scenario is used to validate join discovery on a date key with different column semantics.

columns.name: month
columns.description: First day of the calendar month (YYYY-MM-DD).

columns.name: passengers
columns.description: Number of international airline passengers (thousands). Target column.

columns.name: avg_load_factor_pct
columns.description: Average seat occupancy rate across all routes, as a percentage.
